---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: projects
  type: grid
  fields: 
    - title
    - description
    - date
    - image
    - categories
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
---

\[GoalBook\]

\[Harvest Analysis\]

\*Selected past projects:

\[Selected Mathematica projects\]

\*R Packages:

\[TidyFarm\]

\[DataClean\]
